title: Document Board updates

posts.author: Luigie (Luwidge)
posts.cookedHtml:
We need an update for the Document Board.

I created a quotation using the Document Board, but I noticed that the current permission setting allows users to edit the entire form structure.

I’d like to request an update to the permissions so that users can only edit the necessary fields, while the overall form structure can only be modified by authorized users.

Additional.

As a current user of the Document Board, I should be able to input my lead details in the quotation. However, if another user is also working in the Document Board, I should not be able to see the details they are entering on their side.

posts.author: freaky56den (freaky)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to request an update to the Document Board to improve both permissions and data privacy. Currently, users can edit the entire form structure when creating a quotation. I propose that users should only be able to edit the necessary fields, while the overall form structure remains editable only by authorized users. Additionally, as a user entering lead details, I should only see my own inputs, and if another user is working in the Document Board simultaneously, their entries should not be visible to me. Implementing these changes will help maintain the integrity of our forms and protect individual user input.
